foundationVerification.note: mobile-design-system-foundation is a foundation feature with no validation-contract assertions. It creates reusable mobile primitives (BottomSheet, ActionSheet, BottomNav, MobileAppShell, FAB, SwipeableCard, ResponsiveContainer, ResponsiveGrid, Stack) that will be used by the dealer-sales-mobile-rollout milestone to satisfy VAL-MOBILE-* assertions.
